title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google has released Gemma 4 12B, a multimodal model for local agentic workflows on consumer laptops with unified encoder-free architecture. It supports multi-token prediction to reduce latency and integrates with ecosystems including LiteRT-LM, Ollama, Hermes, and AI Edge Gallery.
